description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes docker-compose-common.yml and defines three Docker services: celery-worker, django-server, and nginx-with-static. For each service, use the Dockerfile at docker/Dockerfile with build targets celery-worker, django-server, and nginx-with-static respectively, with context .. . Attach env files env/secret_locations.env, env/common.env, and env/b-dev.env to the celery-worker and django-server services, set the environment variable UWSGI_HOST=django-server for nginx-with-static, expose ports 8000:80, 80:80, and 443:443, and mount the secrets volume at /run/secrets:ro. No explicit jobs, stages, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined in this pipeline.
